mission.title: falco: ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images
mission.description: ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current falco deployment
steps.description:
Verify your falco version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco
helm list -n falco 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working falco installation.

steps.title: Review falco configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant falco configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco
kubectl get configmap -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=falco
```
The current Falco images are quite large (720 MB) and carry lots of build tools that we want to remove from the current image. The build tools are required to compile kernel modules dynamically when the Falco container starts.

steps.title: Apply the fix for ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images
steps.description:
The current Falco images are quite large (720 MB) and carry lots of build tools that we want to remove from the current image. The build tools are required to compile kernel modules dynamically when the Falco container starts. 

Under the new design we wish to remove the build tools and create two image categories:

Other tasks before this PR is complete:

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco
kubectl get events -n falco --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
The current Falco images are quite large (720 MB) and carry lots of build tools that we want to remove from the current image. The build tools are required to compile kernel modules dynamically when the Falco container starts. 

Under the new design we wish to remove the build tools and create two image categories:

Other tasks before this PR is complete:

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with falco installed or the issue environment reproducible.
